message.content:
The user wants to know how to add "context-1m-2025-08-07" to activate the 1 million token context window in the Claude API / Anthropic SDK. Please research:
1. What this string is (beta header, feature flag, etc.)
2. Where exactly it needs to be added in API requests or SDK code
3. Which models support it
4. A concrete code example (Python and/or TypeScript)

Search the Anthropic docs and any relevant sources to give an accurate, up-to-date answer.

content.text: API Error (eu.anthropic.claude-haiku-4-5-20251001): 400 The provided model identifier is invalid.. Run /model to pick a different model.
